---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Sentinel
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the Desired Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Impact
How would this feature improve Sentinel?
- [ ] Improves accuracy
- [ ] Improves safety
- [ ] Improves usability
- [ ] Adds new capability
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Implementation Notes
If you have thoughts on implementation, share them here:
- Affected components: [FloatLib / Ledger / RiskEngine]
- Complexity: [Simple / Medium / Complex]
- Breaking changes: [Yes / No]
- Test coverage: [describe expected tests]
